capability_defaults.support_notes: Built-in LVYUAN EyeBond G-ASCII control surface for a locally identified 220V/16A/24V/50Hz, SVFW 4.003 device. Model controls were verified on user hardware with SmartValue shadow-learning and follow-up user validation in July 2026.

groups.title: Output
groups.description: Output mode, output priority, nominal output voltage, and remote output state.

groups.title: Battery
groups.description: Battery protection, BMS communication, and equalization behavior.

visible_if.reason: BMS telemetry is not available on this device.

capabilities.title: Battery Energy-Saving Mode
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables battery energy-saving behavior.

capabilities.title: Battery Equalization
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables battery equalization mode.

capabilities.title: Battery Type
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the battery chemistry/profile used by the inverter.

capabilities.title: Battery-Not-Connected Alarm
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables the alarm for missing battery connection.

capabilities.title: Buzzer Silent Mode
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables buzzer silent mode.

capabilities.title: Charging Priority
capabilities.change_summary: Changes which source has priority for battery charging.

capabilities.title: Inverter Soft-Start Relay
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables the inverter soft-start relay behavior.

capabilities.title: Output Mode
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the inverter output/input tolerance mode.

capabilities.title: Output Priority
capabilities.change_summary: Changes how the inverter prioritizes utility, PV, and battery for output.

capabilities.title: Output Voltage Setting
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the nominal AC output voltage target.

capabilities.title: Remote Inverter Switch
capabilities.change_summary: Sends the inverter remote turn-on or remote-shutdown command. No local readback command is currently known for this setting.

capabilities.support_notes: Verified on LVYUAN TY-SIC-3.6KBE-W1 user hardware in July 2026. The inherited JSDSOLAR command mapping is confirmed for this model.
